name: Duplicate Finder
author: Viboplr
description: Find duplicate tracks in your library — the same song downloaded twice or sitting in two folders — and reclaim space by deleting the extra copies. Grouping is diacritic-insensitive (Björk = Bjork) and can optionally require duration and file-size to match too.

apiUsage.reason: Group library tracks that share a normalized title and artist to surface duplicates
Hand deletes to the app's standard delete-with-confirmation flow
Play a copy so you can compare it before deleting
Remember your duplicate-matching options between sessions
